meta.note: 1D measurements only. The 2D/3D lift (BKT vortex pairs, defect and knot lines, Faddeev-Niemi knotted solitons, Skyrme) is literature-typed, not simulated. 'Maximal information capacity at K=1' has no defined measure yet and stays in the Predicted column. The traversal-to-generation reading is interpretation; the ring measurement is its evidence.
